topic: Reusable transformers, serialization, reproducible random state
scope: How a transformation stays identical train to inference.
key_concepts: Ad-hoc scripts for data cleaning are error-prone and hard to reuse.
Transformers must be implemented as distinct, reproducible objects that can be saved and loaded.
Serialization allows a fitted transformer to be written to disk and deployed alongside the model.
Reproducible random state ensures that operations involving randomness (like data splitting or sampling) can be exactly repeated.

definitions.definition: Objek yang memiliki fungsi fit dan transform untuk memanipulasi fitur.
Proses menyimpan objek komputasi dari memori ke dalam wujud berkas permanen.
Parameter awal untuk generator nomor acak agar algoritma menghasilkan urutan pengundian sampel yang identik.

examples: Saving an imputation transformer and a standard scaler together as a single binary file to be loaded in the production server.
